name: sw-list-sessions

outputs.description: Session start time Stealthwatch.Session.ip Session IP
outputs.name: Stealthwatch.Session.start_timestamp_utc

outputs.description: Session connected IP Stealthwatch.Session.device_id Source device ID
outputs.name: Stealthwatch.Session.connected_ip

outputs.description: Connected device ID Stealthwatch.Session.connected_device_is_external Is the connected device external
outputs.name: Stealthwatch.Session.connected_device_id
